command: Write-Output '=== DIAGNOSTIC TEST ==='; Write-Output "Hostname: $env:COMPUTERNAME"; Write-Output "Date: $(Get-Date)"; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== ALL PNP DEVICES (first 30) ==='; $allDevices = Get-PnpDevice -Status OK -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Write-Output "Total connected devices: $($allDevices.Count)"; $allDevices | Select-Object -First 30 Class, FriendlyName, InstanceId | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output ''; Write-Output '=== DEVICE CLASSES SUMMARY ==='; $allDevices | Group-Object Class | Sort-Object Count -Descending | Select-Object -First 20 Count, Name | Format-Table -AutoSize
description: تحقيق 5: اختبار تشخيصي - التحقق من أن الجسر يلتقط المخرجات + عرض أول 30 جهاز متصل وملخص الفئات
